message:
test(fcp-core): pin LeaseResponse + LeaseRequest serde shape (flywheel_connectors-trwwc)

Bead asks for LeaseGrant Display + serde. fcp-core has no type
literally named LeaseGrant; the lease-grant-shaped surface lives
in lease.rs as paired types LeaseRequest (line 472, request to
acquire/renew) and LeaseResponse (line 491, 3-variant
externally-tagged enum: Granted(Box<Lease>) — the actual lease
grant — Denied { current_holder, expires_at, current_seq }, and
Invalid { reason }). Neither implements Display so the bead's
"Display formatting" ask has no direct analogue — pinning
targeted the externally-tagged serde wire form on LeaseResponse
plus full struct shape on LeaseRequest.

Coverage:
- LeaseResponse::Granted JSON shape — externally-tagged single-key
  {"Granted": {<flattened Lease fields>}} with key Lease fields
  spot-checked
- LeaseResponse::Denied JSON shape — single-key with named struct
  fields (current_holder/expires_at/current_seq)
- LeaseResponse::Invalid JSON shape — single-key with reason
- JSON round-trip per variant preserves payload (Granted preserves
  Lease fields; Denied preserves all 3 fields; Invalid preserves
  reason)
- CBOR round-trip preserves Denied + Invalid variants; CBOR carries
  externally-tagged variant key as outer Map key (single-key form
  via Value inspection — pinned that LeaseResponse is externally-
  tagged not internally-tagged so ObjectId-via-hex_or_bytes in the
  Granted payload doesn't hit the Content-shim quirk)
- LeaseRequest JSON shape preserves all 5 fields
  (subject_object_id/zone_id/requester/requested_ttl/renew_seq)
- LeaseRequest::renew_seq has NO skip_serializing_if so None
  serializes as JSON null (distinct from skip_serializing_if
  semantics elsewhere — pinned)
- LeaseRequest JSON + CBOR round-trip preserves all fields
- PascalCase canonical / snake_case outer key rejected on
  LeaseResponse (drift sentinel for any future rename_all swap)
- Unknown variant rejected
- Three variants produce pairwise distinct serializations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
